summary: Excellent front‑of‑board sound captures a standout performance of “The Other One” and “Morning Dew”.
review: This recording delivers remarkable depth and clarity, making it feel like you’re standing on the floor of the Greek Theatre on a warm Bay Area summer evening. Reviewers single out “The Other One” and “Morning Dew” as highlight moments that shine through the pristine front‑of‑board mix.

ai_rating.rationale: One detailed, 4‑star review praises both the musical performance (especially two songs) and the high‑quality front‑of‑board recording; limited sample size lowers confidence.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Front‑of‑board capture praised for depth, clarity and warmth; no reported glitches or balance issues.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Smooth set with a powerful second half highlighted by The Other One and Morning Dew, creating a warm, immersive atmosphere.
